title: Unit 01 The Race Car
wikitext:
[]: Unit 01: The Race Car             Quote Post by cyharding » Wed Apr 14, 2010 10:21 pm I thought I'd post this here. [url]http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/news/2010-04-14/evangelion-sponsors-super-gt300-car-racing-team[/url] I don't know what to think.

[]:             Quote Post by The Triforce Fighter » Thu Apr 15, 2010 11:57 am lol I look forward to see it. I'm just wondering now if the driver will be wearing a plug suit X D

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Thu Apr 15, 2010 7:29 pm TIME TO GET SOME MONEY!!!

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Thu Apr 15, 2010 10:01 pm The Triforce Fighter wrote: lol I look forward to see it. I'm just wondering now if the driver will be wearing a plug suit X D

[]:             Quote Post by The Triforce Fighter » Fri Apr 16, 2010 4:21 am drinian wrote: Well, the driver will be picked randomly from the crowd before each race and told that only they can drive the car to victory.

[]:             Quote Post by Octahedron » Fri Apr 16, 2010 6:51 am And the car will keep going out of the drivers controll and driving by itself, brutally smashing into any other cars in the way.

[]:             Quote Post by Apjak » Fri Apr 16, 2010 9:14 am ...and after winning (demolition derby style by destroying all competition) the car will regenerate itself with the driver still trapped inside... Further scarring the random 14 year old.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Apr 16, 2010 2:57 pm ...the car starts bursting at the seams and starts eating the demolished cars! The driver disappears!

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Fri Apr 16, 2010 9:14 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: ...the car starts bursting at the seams and starts eating the demolished cars! The driver disappears!

[]:             Quote Post by CtHuLhU » Mon Apr 26, 2010 11:14 am http://www.runat.co.jp/teamruna/eva.racing10/top.html

[]:             Quote Post by Ironfoot » Mon Apr 26, 2010 1:40 pm Evangelion Unit 01, Money On Wheels Type.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Apr 26, 2010 1:43 pm I want to laugh. So I will. ...I'm laughing.

[]:             Quote Post by ran1 » Mon Apr 26, 2010 1:52 pm Evangelion =/= Transformer. WTF is this shit? Also, this needs to happen in Nascar so I can root for the Eva-01 car when I go down to see the races in Carolina.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Apr 26, 2010 2:23 pm Hey, Panasonic makes the HD cameras I use for work. I wonder if they make Eva skins for Panasonic cameras as well...

[]:             Quote Post by Peewit » Mon Apr 26, 2010 6:10 pm It looks like a micro-machine.

[]:             Quote Post by Dr. Webster » Thu Apr 29, 2010 6:30 pm Jalopnik just picked this up: http://jalopnik.com/5527522/racing-team-seeks-anime-fanboy-sponsorship Surprisingly, they don't make too much fun of it.

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Fri Apr 30, 2010 10:43 am That is the BEST EVA CAR that I have ever seen! I'll take 8!

[]:             Quote Post by Hoshikawa-kun » Fri Apr 30, 2010 7:46 pm They should have done a Unit-02 car instead and put the 'best pilot for Eva' in it. Because then it would go, y'know... SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Sat May 01, 2010 9:25 am Hoshikawa-kun wrote: They should have done a Unit-02 car instead and put the 'best pilot for Eva' in it. Because then it would go, y'know... SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by cyharding » Sat May 01, 2010 11:38 am And the team wears plugsuit uniforms to boot. What will they do next? On second thought, maybe I don't want to know.
